description: Svelte framework completion data for reactive web components

keywords.description: script - Script tag for component logic. Use lang="ts" for TypeScript support.
style - Scoped CSS styles for the component. Automatically scoped to this component only.
svelte:head - Insert elements into document <head>. Useful for title and meta tags.
svelte:window - Add event listeners to the window object. Automatically cleaned up.
svelte:body - Add event listeners to document.body. Useful for mouseenter/mouseleave.
svelte:document - Add event listeners to the document. For selectionchange, visibilitychange.
svelte:component - Dynamically render a component. Use 'this' prop to specify component.
svelte:self - Allows a component to recursively include itself.
svelte:element - Dynamically render an HTML element. Use 'this' prop to specify tag name.
svelte:options - Specify per-component compiler options like immutable or accessors.
svelte:fragment - Allows content to be placed in a named slot without a wrapper element.
on:click - Click event handler. Add modifiers like preventDefault or stopPropagation.
on:submit - Form submit event handler. Often used with preventDefault modifier.
on:input - Input event handler. Fires when input value changes.
on:change - Change event handler. Fires when input loses focus after value changed.
bind:value - Two-way binding for input values. Updates variable when input changes.
bind:checked - Two-way binding for checkbox/radio button checked state.
bind:group - Bind radio buttons or checkboxes to the same variable.
bind:this - Get a reference to a DOM element or component instance.
class: - Conditionally apply CSS classes. Shorthand: class:active={isActive}
use: - Apply an action to an element. Actions run when element is created.
transition: - Apply bidirectional transition when element enters/leaves DOM.
in: - Apply transition when element enters the DOM.
out: - Apply transition when element leaves the DOM.
animate: - Apply animation when element's position changes in a keyed each block.
let: - Expose values from a component to its slot content.
slot - Define a slot for child content. Can be named with name attribute.
$: - Reactive statement. Runs whenever referenced values change.
$store - Auto-subscribe to a store. Automatically unsubscribes on component destroy.
export let - Declare a component prop. Can have default values.
export const - Export a constant that can be imported by other modules.
export function - Export a function that can be called from parent via bind:this.
{#if} - Conditional rendering. Can be combined with {:else if} and {:else}.
{:else if} - Else-if clause in conditional rendering.
{:else} - Else clause in conditional rendering or await blocks.
{#each} - Iterate over an array. Use (item, index) for index access.
{#await} - Handle promises with pending, then, and catch states.
{:then} - Handle resolved promise value in await block.
{:catch} - Handle promise rejection in await block.
{#key} - Destroy and recreate contents when expression changes.
@html - Render HTML string. WARNING: Can expose to XSS attacks. Sanitize first!
@debug - Trigger debugger when variables change. Useful for debugging.
@const - Define local constants in markup. Scoped to current block.
on:keydown - Keyboard key press event handler.
on:keyup - Keyboard key release event handler.
on:focus - Element receives focus event handler.
on:blur - Element loses focus event handler.
on:mouseover - Mouse enters element or child event handler.
on:mouseenter - Mouse enters element (no bubbling) event handler.
on:mouseleave - Mouse leaves element (no bubbling) event handler.
on:touchstart - Touch begins on element event handler. For mobile interactions.
on:contextmenu - Right-click / context menu event handler.
on:scroll - Element scroll event handler.
on:drag - Element drag event handler. Part of HTML5 drag and drop API.
on:drop - Drop event handler for drag-and-drop targets.
|preventDefault - Event modifier that calls event.preventDefault() before the handler.
|stopPropagation - Event modifier that calls event.stopPropagation().
|capture - Event modifier that fires handler during capture phase instead of bubbling.
|once - Event modifier that removes handler after first invocation.
|self - Event modifier that triggers handler only if event.target is the element itself.
|trusted - Event modifier that fires handler only if event.isTrusted is true (user-initiated).
|passive - Event modifier that improves scrolling performance. Handler cannot call preventDefault.
|nonpassive - Event modifier that explicitly sets passive: false. Needed for preventDefault on touch events.
bind:innerHTML - Two-way binding for element's HTML content. Use with contenteditable.
bind:textContent - Two-way binding for element's text content. Use with contenteditable.
bind:clientWidth - Read-only binding for element's width. Updates on resize.
bind:clientHeight - Read-only binding for element's height. Updates on resize.
bind:offsetWidth - Read-only binding for element's offset width (includes border).
bind:offsetHeight - Read-only binding for element's offset height (includes border).
bind:open - Two-way binding for <details> element's open state.
bind:files - Binding for file input's FileList. Read the selected files.
bind:currentTime - Two-way binding for media element's current playback position.
bind:duration - Read-only binding for media element's total duration.
bind:paused - Two-way binding for media element's paused state.
bind:volume - Two-way binding for media element's volume (0 to 1).
bind:muted - Two-way binding for media element's muted state.
bind:playbackRate - Two-way binding for media element's playback speed.
bind:seeking - Read-only binding for whether media is currently seeking.
bind:ended - Read-only binding for whether media playback has ended.
bind:scrollX - Two-way binding for window's horizontal scroll position.
bind:scrollY - Two-way binding for window's vertical scroll position.
bind:innerWidth - Read-only binding for window's inner width.
bind:innerHeight - Read-only binding for window's inner height.
bind:outerWidth - Read-only binding for window's outer width.
bind:outerHeight - Read-only binding for window's outer height.
bind:online - Read-only binding for window's navigator.onLine status.
style: - Dynamic inline style directive. Apply individual CSS properties reactively.
fade - Transition that animates opacity. Import from 'svelte/transition'.
blur - Transition that animates a blur filter with opacity. Import from 'svelte/transition'.
fly - Transition that animates x/y position with opacity. Import from 'svelte/transition'.
slide - Transition that slides element in/out by animating height. Import from 'svelte/transition'.
scale - Transition that animates opacity and scale. Import from 'svelte/transition'.
draw - Transition for SVG elements that animates stroke. Import from 'svelte/transition'.
crossfade - Creates paired send/receive transitions for elements moving between containers.
keywords.example: const [send, receive] = crossfade({ duration: 300, fallback: fade });

keywords.description: flip - FLIP animation for keyed each blocks. Import from 'svelte/animate'.
writable - Create a writable store with get/set/update methods. From 'svelte/store'.
keywords.example: import { writable } from 'svelte/store'; const count = writable(0);

keywords.description: readable - Create a read-only store. Set values via callback. From 'svelte/store'.
keywords.example: import { readable } from 'svelte/store'; const time = readable(new Date(), set => { ... });

keywords.description: derived - Create a store whose value is derived from other stores. From 'svelte/store'.
keywords.example: import { derived } from 'svelte/store'; const doubled = derived(count, $c => $c * 2);

keywords.description: get - Read store value once without subscribing. From 'svelte/store'.
keywords.example: import { get } from 'svelte/store'; const value = get(myStore);

keywords.description: tweened - Create a store that animates between values over time. From 'svelte/motion'.
keywords.example: import { tweened } from 'svelte/motion'; const progress = tweened(0, { duration: 400 });

keywords.description: spring - Create a store that animates with spring physics. From 'svelte/motion'.
keywords.example: import { spring } from 'svelte/motion'; const coords = spring({ x: 0, y: 0 }, { stiffness: 0.1, damping: 0.25 });

keywords.description: onMount - Lifecycle: runs after component is first rendered to DOM. From 'svelte'.
keywords.example: import { onMount } from 'svelte'; onMount(() => { /* setup */ return () => { /* cleanup */ }; });

keywords.description: onDestroy - Lifecycle: runs when component is destroyed. From 'svelte'.
beforeUpdate - Lifecycle: runs before DOM is updated. From 'svelte'.
keywords.example: import { beforeUpdate } from 'svelte'; beforeUpdate(() => { /* pre-update logic */ });

keywords.description: afterUpdate - Lifecycle: runs after DOM is updated. From 'svelte'.
keywords.example: import { afterUpdate } from 'svelte'; afterUpdate(() => { /* post-update logic */ });

keywords.description: tick - Returns a promise that resolves after pending state changes are applied to DOM.
keywords.example: import { tick } from 'svelte'; await tick(); // DOM is now updated

keywords.description: setContext - Set a context value accessible to child components. From 'svelte'.
getContext - Get a context value set by a parent component. From 'svelte'.
keywords.example: import { getContext } from 'svelte'; const theme = getContext('theme');

keywords.description: hasContext - Check if a context key has been set by a parent. From 'svelte'.
getAllContexts - Get all context as a Map. Useful for forwarding context. From 'svelte'.
keywords.example: import { getAllContexts } from 'svelte'; const contexts = getAllContexts();

keywords.description: createEventDispatcher - Create a dispatcher for custom component events. From 'svelte'.
$state - Svelte 5 rune: declare reactive state. Replaces top-level let declarations.
$derived - Svelte 5 rune: declare derived state. Replaces $: reactive declarations.
$derived.by - Svelte 5 rune: derived state with a function body for complex computations.
keywords.example: let total = $derived.by(() => { return items.reduce((sum, i) => sum + i.price, 0); });

keywords.description: $effect - Svelte 5 rune: run side effects when dependencies change. Replaces $: blocks.
$effect.pre - Svelte 5 rune: run effect before DOM updates. Replaces beforeUpdate.
$props - Svelte 5 rune: declare component props. Replaces export let.
$bindable - Svelte 5 rune: mark a prop as bindable from parent components.
$inspect - Svelte 5 rune: debug reactive state changes. Logs when values change.
$host - Svelte 5 rune: access host element in custom elements mode.
{#snippet} - Svelte 5: define reusable markup blocks within a component.
{@render} - Svelte 5: render a snippet. Replaces slot-based composition.
svelte:boundary - Svelte 5: error boundary. Catches errors in child components.
untrack - Read reactive state without creating a dependency. From 'svelte'.
keywords.example: import { untrack } from 'svelte'; $effect(() => { const val = untrack(() => other); });

keywords.description: unstate - Get a plain object from $state proxy. From 'svelte'. For serialization.
keywords.example: import { unstate } from 'svelte'; const plain = unstate(myState);

keywords.description: mount - Svelte 5: programmatically mount a component. From 'svelte'.
keywords.example: import { mount } from 'svelte'; const app = mount(App, { target: document.body, props: {} });

keywords.description: unmount - Svelte 5: programmatically unmount a component. From 'svelte'.
hydrate - Svelte 5: hydrate a server-rendered component. From 'svelte'.
keywords.example: import { hydrate } from 'svelte'; hydrate(App, { target: document.body });

snippets.description: Reactive statement that runs when dependencies change
Conditional rendering with if-else if-else chain
Iterate with unique key for better performance
Iterate with fallback for empty array
Handle promise with only then block
Destroy and recreate content when value changes
Bind multiple inputs to same variable
Define a slot for child content

snippets.content:
import { writable } from 'svelte/store';

export const ${1:count} = writable(${2:0});

import { derived } from 'svelte/store';

export const ${1:doubled} = derived(${2:count}, $${2:count} => $${2:count} * 2);

snippets.description: tick function to wait for pending state changes
Module context script (runs once per module)

<script context="module">
	${1:// Shared between all instances}
	export const ${2:shared} = ${3:value};
</script>

<script>
	${4:// Instance-specific logic}
</script>

snippets.description: Local transition (only plays on direct block changes, not parent)
Window bindings for scroll and dimensions
Complete form with multiple field types
snippets.content:
<form on:submit|preventDefault={${1:handleSubmit}}>
	<label>
		${2:Name}:
		<input type="text" bind:value={${3:name}} required />
	</label>

	<label>
		${4:Email}:
		<input type="email" bind:value={${5:email}} required />
	</label>

	<label>
		<input type="checkbox" bind:checked={${6:agreed}} />
		${7:I agree to terms}
	</label>

	<button type="submit" disabled={!${6:agreed}}>${8:Submit}</button>
</form>

${2:Default header}
${3:Default content}
${4:Default footer}

<!-- Provider component -->
<script>
	import { setContext } from 'svelte';
	import { writable } from 'svelte/store';

	const ${1:store} = writable(${2:initialValue});
	setContext('${3:key}', ${1:store});
</script>

<slot />

{#if ${2:loading}}

Loading...

{:else if ${3:error}}

Error: {${3:error}}

{:else} {#each ${1:data} as ${5:item}}

{${5:item}}

{/each} {/if}

snippets.description: Click outside action for closing dropdowns/modals
Component options for immutable data optimization
Compile component as custom element (web component)
Lazy load component with dynamic import
snippets.content:
{#if ${1:Component}} {:else}

Loading...

{/if}

<script>
	let ${1:count} = $state(${2:0});
	let ${3:doubled} = $derived(${1:count} * 2);

	function ${4:increment}() {
		${1:count}++;
	}
</script>

<button onclick={${4:increment}}>
	Clicked {${1:count}} times (doubled: {${3:doubled}})
</button>

snippets.description: Svelte 5 derived state with function body
Svelte 5 component with children snippet (replaces slots)

snippets.content:
<script>
	import { onMount, onDestroy } from 'svelte';

	let ${1:count} = 0;
	let interval;

	onMount(() => {
		interval = setInterval(() => {
			${1:count}++;
		}, ${2:1000});
	});

	onDestroy(() => {
		if (interval) clearInterval(interval);
	});
</script>

{#if ${1:showModal}}
{/if}

{${2:item}.${4:name}}
{/each}
